headline: Pfizer’s HYMPAVZI Pediatric Approval Deepens Rare Disease Growth Story
summary: U.S. FDA expands approval of HYMPAVZI for pediatric hemophilia A and B patients. Label now includes children as young as six, with and without inhibitors. First subcutaneous non factor therapy approved for hemophilia B patients ages 6 to 11. Development is material for Pfizer’s (NYSE:PFE) hemophilia segment and rare disease portfolio. For Pfizer, rare diseases sit alongside vaccines, oncology, and other therapeutics as core parts of its business mix. The broader hemophilia treatment space...
